{{Infobox character
| name = Grave Hound
| titles = {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Grave Hound]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Syndicates}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Grave]] [[Hound]] is a summoned beast and entity associated with [[Omega]], who is also known as the founder of Escalon and the [[Pilot]] of [[The Last Horizon]]. This being is described as a terrifying figure that inspires fear in others, including [[Planetary Security]], and has even requested the destruction of [[Solstice]]. [[The Grave]] [[Hound]] is not a person but a summoned creature that has been held in captivity within a spell-anchor using a technique called [[Absolute Burial]], which suppresses a victim's physical strength, magical connections, powers, and thoughts. While some individuals seek to negotiate with the entity, others express distrust regarding its safety or presence. There are mentions of a leash being required for the Grave [[Hound]], and discussions regarding its daughter and his status as a non-tame being.}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Grave Hound]] is a figure that terrifies the [[Syndicates]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c22">''The Engineer'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Grave Hound]] went after [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c43">''The Engineer'', chapter 43</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Benri]] does not trust the [[Grave Hound]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c22">''The Knight'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Grave Hound]] is an entity that requires a leash.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c1">''The Pilot'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Grave Hound]] requested the destruction of [[Solstice]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16">''The Pilot'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Omega]] is referred to as the [[Grave Hound]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c34">''The Pilot'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“Not while I’m onboard,” Benri said immediately. “You think I’d trust my safety to the Grave Hound?”<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c22" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“You can do whatever you want with the company, but the Grave Hound needs a leash. I’m headed back to Zykaros.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
